purpose: Restore the complete current Savingio state without asking the user to reconstruct memory.
authority_order: GitHub main actual files and latest commit
required_boot_steps: read MASTER_LOG README and current log
read every classified master log file
compare log baseline with latest main
inspect actual files for failures and pending work
repair stale logs before new development
continue from the verified next action
required_end_of_run_writes: classify success failure decision handover knowledge and QA results
forbidden_regressions: treating ZIP as the official source
claiming GitHub write access is unavailable without checking
asking the user to reconstruct completed history
using old workflow guidance over current repository evidence
ending a run before classified logs are saved

trigger_behavior.마스터로그보고와: Read every Savingio master log, compare against latest main, determine the current start point, and continue without asking the user to reconstruct context.
